# WP-SXO — AI Content Engine for WordPress

> Two WordPress plugins sold from wpsxo.com. WP-SXO scores and rewrites your content using Search Experience Optimization (SXO) methodology. OnPress converts Figma designs into deployable WordPress themes and plugins.

**Products:** WP-SXO Plugin · OnPress Plugin
**Vendor:** RocketOpp LLC
**Domain:** wpsxo.com

---

## Plugin #1 — WP-SXO

> AI content scoring + rewriting plugin for WordPress. The "SXO score" rates every page across 8 dimensions (BLUF, header depth, information gain, table trap, readability, schema markup, internal links, content length). The Pro/Agency tiers add AI rewriting via the connected AI council.

### What it scores
1. **BLUF** (20% weight) — does the first paragraph answer the question?
2. **Header Depth** (15%) — H1 → H2 → H3 hierarchy enforced
3. **Information Gain** (15%) — data, statistics, examples, case studies
4. **Table Trap** (10%) — comparison tables, ordered lists, FAQ-style headers
5. **Readability** (15%) — sentence length, active voice, transitions
6. **Schema Markup** (10%) — auto-injected JSON-LD (Article, FAQPage, HowTo, LocalBusiness)
7. **Internal Links** (5%) — 2–3 site-internal + 1 external authority
8. **Content Length** (10%) — 1,200–1,800 words for posts, 800–1,200 for landings

### Tiers

| Tier | Price | Sites | Features |
|------|-------|-------|----------|
| **Free** | $0 | 1 | Basic scoring, manual recommendations |
| **Pro** | $49/year | 3 | Full scoring + AI rewriting + CRM account |
| **Agency** | $99/year | Unlimited | White-label + API access + bulk operations |
| **Max** | Custom | Unlimited | Auto-rewrite stale content, /fix command |

### Integration

WP-SXO exposes a REST API namespace `/wp-json/oncore/v1/` on every site:

```
GET  /wp-json/oncore/v1/site-info
GET  /wp-json/oncore/v1/content
POST /wp-json/oncore/v1/pages
POST /wp-json/oncore/v1/posts
GET  /wp-json/oncore/v1/sxo/score/{id}
POST /wp-json/oncore/v1/sxo/score
GET  /wp-json/oncore/v1/sxo/health
```

Auth header: `X-OnCore-License: WPSXO-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX`

Free download: https://wpsxo.com/api/downloads/free?product=wpsxo
Releases: https://github.com/Crypto-Goatz/onpress-wp/releases

---

## Plugin #2 — OnPress

> Figma → WordPress converter. Paste a Figma file URL, get back a deployable WordPress theme or plugin in 30 seconds. Handles Beaver Builder, Elementor, and native Gutenberg blocks.

**Price:** $49/year (single license, unlimited sites)

### What it converts

- Figma frames → WordPress page templates
- Figma component variants → reusable Gutenberg blocks
- Figma auto-layout → CSS Grid + Flexbox
- Figma color/text styles → theme.json design tokens
- Figma asset library → /wp-content/uploads/

### Builder support

| Builder | Status |
|---------|:------:|
| Native Gutenberg | ✓ |
| Beaver Builder | ✓ (modules + nodes) |
| Elementor | ✓ (JSON layout) |
| Divi | Roadmap |
| Bricks | Roadmap |

---

## Stack

Next.js 16.2.1 · React 19.2.4 · Supabase · Stripe (subscriptions + checkout) · Tailwind v4

- / — Landing (both products promoted)
- /products/wpsxo — WP-SXO product detail + pricing
- /products/onpress — OnPress product detail + pricing
- /login, /signup — Auth
